name: Proptero Funding - Private Hard Money Lender
description_short: Proptero is a private hard money and bridge lender specializing in real estate investor financing, offering fix-and-flip loans, bridge loans, and rental property financing with fast approval timelines.
description_long:
Proptero Funding is a San Diego-based private lending company focused on serving real estate investors and developers. The company positions itself as a relationship-driven lender that combines speed with flexible underwriting criteria, targeting borrowers who may not qualify for traditional bank financing or need faster capital deployment.

Proptero offers multiple loan products tailored to real estate investors: fix-and-flip rehabilitation loans ($100K-$5M), bridge loans ($100K-$10M), new construction financing ($100K-$10M), long-term rental loans ($100K-$5M), commercial loans ($200K-$10M), and expedited hard money loans ($100K-$2M). Loan-to-value ratios range from 75-90% depending on the product, with rates starting as low as 3.5% for rental and commercial products and reaching 12.5% for rush hard money funding. The company advertises same-day pre-approvals and funding as quickly as 7 days for standard loans or 48-72 hours for rush funding.

Proptero differentiates itself through operational features including no pre-payment penalties, no application fees, no tax return requirements, acceptance of foreign nationals, no minimum credit score requirement, a paperless online portal for document submission, and flexible terms including cross-collateralization. They emphasize technology infrastructure and transparent real-time loan tracking. The marketing emphasizes "common sense underwriting" and streamlined processes designed to reduce documentation burden compared to traditional lenders.

The company is suited for experienced and novice real estate investors seeking non-traditional financing. However, prospective borrowers should note that higher rates (particularly for hard money at 12.5%) reflect the accelerated timelines and reduced documentation standards. The lack of published reviews, placeholder testimonials on the website (generic "John Doe" quotes with Latin filler text), and limited third-party verification present challenges in assessing customer satisfaction. Borrowers should carefully review all fee structures and compare rates across multiple private lenders before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day pre-approvals and funding in as few as 7 days, with rush funding available in 48-72 hours
No pre-payment penalties, application fees, tax return requirements, or minimum FICO score
High leverage options (up to 90% of purchase price for fix-and-flips, up to 100% of rehab costs)
Accepts foreign nationals and borrowers with no real estate investment experience
Online portal with real-time loan tracking and paperless document submission process
Flexible terms including cross-collateralization and no DSCR requirements
Loan amounts up to $10M for bridge, new construction, and commercial products
cons: Hard money rates reach 12.5%, significantly higher than traditional mortgage rates
Website testimonials are placeholder text with generic 'John Doe' quotes and Latin filler content, raising credibility concerns
No publicly available customer reviews or independent third-party verification of service quality
Limited transparency on fees beyond rate quotes; full cost structures require contacting the company
Minimum loan amounts of $100K-$200K may exclude smaller real estate investors
best_for: Real estate investors and house flippers needing quick capital for fix-and-flip projects
Developers seeking bridge financing to close quickly between property acquisition and traditional refinancing
Commercial real estate investors with non-traditional credit profiles or documentation challenges
Borrowers with foreign national status or limited credit history seeking real estate investment financing
diagnosis: Proptero is best suited for real estate investors and developers who prioritize speed and flexibility over traditional underwriting and can accept higher costs associated with private lending. The primary caveat is verifying actual service quality and true costs, as the website lacks authentic customer testimonials and detailed fee breakdowns—borrowers should request comprehensive Loan Estimates and compare multiple lenders before proceeding.
services: Fix and flip/rehab loans with up to 100% rehab cost coverage
Bridge loans for short-term financing (12-36 month terms)
New construction loans including ground-up and spec property financing
Long-term rental property loans with 30-year terms and interest-only options
Commercial property loans for all property types
Fast hard money loans with 48-hour rush funding
Online loan application and document submission portal
Cash-out refinancing across all loan products
Flexible underwriting with reduced documentation requirements
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
